stocks.description: Plug Power Inc. is a leading provider of hydrogen fuel cell solutions, offering a range of products and services for the clean energy market. The company's main products include fuel cell systems, hydrogen refueling stations, and fuel cell-powered forklifts, primarily targeting the material handling and stationary power markets. Plug Power's solutions aim to replace traditional fossil fuel-based power systems with cleaner, more efficient hydrogen fuel cell technology.

Sabre Corp is a leading technology provider to the global travel industry, offering software and services that power travel booking systems, airline and hotel operations, and travel agency management. The company's main products include its SabreSonic passenger management system, Sabre AirCentre airline operations suite, and SynXis hospitality management solutions. Sabre's market focus is on airlines, hotels, travel agencies, and other travel industry stakeholders, providing them with technology to manage their operations and customer interactions.

Kosmos Energy Ltd is an independent oil and gas exploration and production company. The company's main products and services include the exploration, development, and production of oil and natural gas, with a focus on deepwater assets in West Africa, the Gulf of Mexico, and other regions. Kosmos Energy's market focus is on creating value through the discovery and development of new oil and gas resources, with an emphasis on sustainable and responsible operations.

Clarivate Plc (CLVT) is a global leader in providing trusted information and insights to accelerate innovation and improve outcomes. The company offers a range of products and services, including intellectual property and scientific research solutions, such as Web of Science, Derwent, and MarkMonitor. Clarivate's solutions cater to various markets, including academia, government, and industries like pharmaceuticals, technology, and finance.

W & T Offshore Inc is an independent oil and natural gas producer that focuses on the acquisition, exploration, and development of oil and natural gas properties. The company's main products and services include the production and sale of crude oil and natural gas, with a primary market focus on the Gulf of Mexico. WTI operates in the offshore waters of the Gulf of Mexico, where it explores for and produces oil and natural gas from its leased properties.

Optimum Communications Inc, operating as OPTU, is a telecommunications company that provides a range of services including internet, TV, phone, and mobile plans. The company's main products and services focus on delivering high-speed connectivity and entertainment solutions to residential and business customers. OPTU primarily serves the northeastern United States, offering competitive pricing and bundled packages to its target market.

stocks.company_name: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc
stocks.description: Petco Health and Wellness Co Inc, ticker symbol WOOF, is a specialty retailer that provides pet food, supplies, and services. The company offers a range of products and services, including pet grooming, training, and veterinary care, catering to the health and wellness needs of pets. Petco operates a network of physical stores and an e-commerce platform, focusing on the US pet care market.

Service Properties Trust (SVC) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns a diverse portfolio of hotels and other properties. The company's main focus is on the hospitality sector, with a portfolio of hotels operated under various brands such as Marriott, Hilton, and Hyatt. SVC generates revenue primarily through hotel operations, as well as rental income from its net lease properties.

Clear Channel Outdoor Holdings Inc (CCO) is a leading outdoor advertising company that provides a range of advertising services through various media platforms. The company's main products and services include billboards, digital displays, and other out-of-home advertising solutions, helping businesses reach their target audiences. CCO's market focus is on providing effective advertising solutions to clients across the globe, with a presence in over 30 countries worldwide.

stocks.company_name: KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc

stocks.description: Coty Inc is a global beauty company that manufactures and markets a wide range of cosmetics, fragrances, and skincare products. The company's main products include fragrances, color cosmetics, and skin and body care products, with popular brands such as CoverGirl, Max Factor, and Rimmel. Coty's market focus is on the mass and prestige beauty markets, serving consumers worldwide through various distribution channels.

AMC Entertainment Holdings Inc. is a leading theatrical exhibition company that owns and operates a global chain of movie theaters. The company's main products and services include film exhibition, food and beverage sales, and premium formats such as IMAX and 3D screenings. AMC's market focus is on providing an immersive cinematic experience to moviegoers, with a presence in the United States, Europe, and other international markets.

Evolent Health Inc (EVH) is a healthcare company that provides clinical and administrative services to healthcare providers and payers. The company's main products and services include value-based care platforms, population health management, and healthcare consulting services. Evolent Health focuses on helping its clients transition to value-based care models, improving healthcare outcomes and reducing costs.

Clover Health Investments Corp is a healthcare company that offers Medicare Advantage plans to eligible individuals. The company's main product is its Medicare Advantage plans, which provide affordable healthcare coverage to seniors and other eligible individuals. Clover Health focuses on using technology and data analytics to improve health outcomes and reduce costs for its members, primarily targeting the Medicare-eligible population.

Gevo Inc is a specialty chemicals company that develops and produces renewable, low-carbon fuels and chemicals. The company's main products include isobutanol, a bio-based alternative to petroleum-based fuels and chemicals, as well as jet fuel and other hydrocarbons. Gevo's market focus is on the renewable energy and chemicals sectors, targeting customers in the aviation, automotive, and chemical industries.

Brandywine Realty Trust (BDN) is a real estate investment trust (REIT) that owns, develops, and manages office properties. The company's main products and services include leasing and property management of urban, town center, and suburban office buildings. Brandywine focuses on the Mid-Atlantic United States and Texas markets, providing office space to a diverse range of tenants.

Alight Inc, formerly known as Alight Solutions, is a cloud-based human capital and technology services company. The company provides a range of software and services, including cloud-based HR, payroll, and benefits administration solutions, to help organizations manage their workforce and optimize business outcomes. Alight's main products and services focus on the human capital management (HCM) market, serving large and medium-sized enterprises globally.

stocks.company_name: Full Truck Alliance Co Ltd ADR
